news.title:
Eternal: Nifty opens below 22,800; Sensex declines 700 points.
IndiGo shares witness a decline during market opening.
news.summary:

news.title: Eternal rebounds over 3% from its intraday low.
news.summary: Eternal rebounds over 3% from its intraday low.

news.title:
Swiggy, Eternal, and Nykaa are projected to show strong Q4 FY26 growth, with Swiggy's GOV up 21.6% YoY and Nykaa's revenue up 26% YoY.
Bharti Airtel and Jio expect stable growth, while Vodafone Idea may see subscriber losses; 5G rollout and debt updates are key.
news.summary:
Swiggy, Eternal, and Nykaa are projected to show strong Q4 FY26 growth, with Swiggy's GOV up 21.6% YoY and Nykaa's revenue up 26% YoY.
Bharti Airtel and Jio expect stable growth, while Vodafone Idea may see subscriber losses; 5G rollout and debt updates are key.

news.title:
Bernstein predicts Zomato, Swiggy to improve profitability via fee hikes, boosting EBITDA by 4-9% per order.
Quick commerce valuations show Zomato at $12-14B vs. Swiggy's $4-5B; consolidation may narrow the gap.
news.summary:
Bernstein predicts Zomato, Swiggy to improve profitability via fee hikes, boosting EBITDA by 4-9% per order.
Quick commerce valuations show Zomato at $12-14B vs. Swiggy's $4-5B; consolidation may narrow the gap.

news.title:
Kotak Securities maintains a 'Buy' on Eternal with a Rs 375 target price.
Fee hikes, larger delivery radius may offset rising costs and sustain margins.
news.summary:
Kotak Securities maintains a 'Buy' on Eternal with a Rs 375 target price.
Fee hikes, larger delivery radius may offset rising costs and sustain margins.

news.title:
Zomato raises platform fee by 19.2% to Rs 14.9 per order due to rising crude oil prices and LPG crisis.
Fee hike aims to offset operational costs but may impact consumer sentiment and reshape competition in food delivery.
news.summary:
Zomato raises platform fee by 19.2% to Rs 14.9 per order due to rising crude oil prices and LPG crisis.
Fee hike aims to offset operational costs but may impact consumer sentiment and reshape competition in food delivery.

news.title:
Zomato faces limited competition, but Blinkit risks competition from e-commerce giants and agentic AI.
JM Financial sees Eternal's FY28 EV/Ebitda attractive but warns of Blinkit's high risk in quick commerce.
news.summary:
Zomato faces limited competition, but Blinkit risks competition from e-commerce giants and agentic AI.
JM Financial sees Eternal's FY28 EV/Ebitda attractive but warns of Blinkit's high risk in quick commerce.

news.title:
Eternal Ltd surged 3.6% on 17 Mar 2026, hitting Rs 228.9 intraday high.
The stock outperformed Sensex's 0.18% gain, showcasing strength in E-Retail sector.
news.summary:
Eternal Ltd surged 3.6% on 17 Mar 2026, hitting Rs 228.9 intraday high.
The stock outperformed Sensex's 0.18% gain, showcasing strength in E-Retail sector.

news.title:
UBS maintains Buy on Eternal with ₹375 TP, citing 20–21% YoY food delivery growth in Feb’26.
Cooking gas shortages may impact Mar-Apr volumes; Blinkit expands quick-commerce lead over Instamart & Zepto.
news.summary:
UBS maintains Buy on Eternal with ₹375 TP, citing 20–21% YoY food delivery growth in Feb’26.
Cooking gas shortages may impact Mar-Apr volumes; Blinkit expands quick-commerce lead over Instamart & Zepto.

news.title:
Swiggy and Eternal may see Q4FY26 GOV dip due to gas shortage.
Restaurants are cutting menus or shutting down, impacting order volumes.
news.summary:
Swiggy and Eternal may see Q4FY26 GOV dip due to gas shortage.
Restaurants are cutting menus or shutting down, impacting order volumes.

news.title:
Eternal Ltd shares fall 4% as LPG shortage impacts restaurant operations.
Iran warns oil may hit $200; rupee weakens amid rising crude prices.
news.summary:
Eternal Ltd shares fall 4% as LPG shortage impacts restaurant operations.
Iran warns oil may hit $200; rupee weakens amid rising crude prices.

news.title:
Eternal Ltd invests Rs 450 crore into Blinkit to boost its quick commerce business.
This is Eternal's first capital infusion into Blinkit in 2026 amid rising competition.
news.summary:
Eternal Ltd invests Rs 450 crore into Blinkit to boost its quick commerce business.
This is Eternal's first capital infusion into Blinkit in 2026 amid rising competition.

news.title:
Swiggy, magicpin, and Zomato saw growth in Oct-Dec period.
Growth driven by festive demand, affordability, and user expansion.
news.summary:
Swiggy, magicpin, and Zomato saw growth in Oct-Dec period.

news.title: Kotak retains 'Buy' rating on Eternal, reduces target price to Rs 375.
news.summary: Kotak retains 'Buy' rating on Eternal, reduces target price to Rs 375.

news.title:
ETERNAL saw a BSE block trade of ~98.9M shares at Rs 247.05.
The total transaction value of the trade was Rs 2,443.2 crore.
news.summary:
ETERNAL saw a BSE block trade of ~98.9M shares at Rs 247.05.
The total transaction value of the trade was Rs 2,443.2 crore.

news.title:
Balkrishna Ind. saw volumes surge 43.9x to 3.05L shares, stock down 2.3% at Rs.2459. Eternal Ltd surged 29.5x to 1035.22L shares, up 1.5% at Rs.254.
Tejas Networks rose 8.4% to Rs.344.65 with 25.8x volume increase. EID Parry gained 0.6% at Rs.871, Angel One dropped 1.9% to Rs.244.30, both with volume spikes.
news.summary:
Balkrishna Ind. saw volumes surge 43.9x to 3.05L shares, stock down 2.3% at Rs.2459. Eternal Ltd surged 29.5x to 1035.22L shares, up 1.5% at Rs.254.
Tejas Networks rose 8.4% to Rs.344.65 with 25.8x volume increase. EID Parry gained 0.6% at Rs.871, Angel One dropped 1.9% to Rs.244.30, both with volume spikes.

news.title:
Zomato reported a 21.3% rise in gross order value in Dec quarter.
Swiggy saw slightly slower growth at 20.5%, both exceeding 20% after several quarters.
news.summary:
Zomato reported a 21.3% rise in gross order value in Dec quarter.
Swiggy saw slightly slower growth at 20.5%, both exceeding 20% after several quarters.

news.title:
Eternal Ltd partners with OpenAI to enhance AI across Zomato, Blinkit, and its ecosystem.
The collaboration includes AI-assisted workflows, partner upskilling, and internal automation integration with OpenAI models.
news.summary:
Eternal Ltd partners with OpenAI to enhance AI across Zomato, Blinkit, and its ecosystem.

news.title: Eternal shares surged 6%, hitting a three-month high.
news.summary: Eternal shares surged 6%, hitting a three-month high.

news.title:
Deepinder Goyal resigns as CEO, MD, and Director of Eternal Ltd, effective February 1, 2026.
Albinder Dhindsa appointed as new Group CEO; Goyal transitions to Vice Chairman role focusing on strategy and ethics.
news.summary:
Deepinder Goyal resigns as CEO, MD, and Director of Eternal Ltd, effective February 1, 2026.
Albinder Dhindsa appointed as new Group CEO; Goyal transitions to Vice Chairman role focusing on strategy and ethics.
